# Valid Exercise

> Disclaimer: GymPrimer is educational content for general exercise literacy. It is not medical advice and not personalized coaching. Stop if something feels sharp, worsening, unusual, or unsafe, and seek qualified help when needed. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## What this exercise is for

This page explains a beginner machine exercise.

## Equipment setup

Use the machine in a controlled, unrushed way. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## Muscles involved

Use plain beginner-readable names.

## Movement breakdown

Move with control.

## What you should feel

You should feel the target muscles working, not sharp pain. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## Common mistakes

Rushing the movement can make practice harder to control. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## Easier version

Use a lighter setting.

## Harder version

Use a slightly harder setting.

## Safety notes

Stop if you feel sharp or worsening discomfort. [Mayo Clinic][mayo-weight-training]

## Sources

- [Mayo Clinic - Weight training][mayo-weight-training]
